pattern: A deletable block is exactly a pair of prefix positions sharing a residue mod k, so a residue-indexed prefix DP tracks the cheapest remaining sum.
hints: A contiguous block has sum divisible by k precisely when its two prefix sums are congruent modulo k.
Walk the prefixes, deciding at each element either to keep it or to close a divisible block back to an earlier matching residue.
Track, per residue, the best dp value reached at a prefix with that residue, and combine forward.

stress.description: small arrays so the deletion-search oracle stays fast
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, max(1, min(size, 7)))
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 10) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randint(1, 6)
    return [nums, k]
